description: A potential new customer wants to sign up for a mobile plan.

nodes.task_description: Check service coverage at the customer's primary address.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms strong 5G coverage at the provided address.

nodes.task_description: Ask qualifying questions about data usage and budget to recommend a suitable plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers customer needs and recommends the 'Unlimited Plus' plan.

nodes.task_description: Create a new customer account and process the order for the new plan and SIM card.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the account and places the order.
